name_en: Exclusive real shot 🎬 HD copper hardware. Can be used on the side with the gingham print lining. Adjustable side drawstring silhouette, with removable inner pocket. Top leather double handles, side drawstring to tighten the opening. Includes removable zippered pouch with shoulder strap. Latest large reversible shopper, mother-daughter shoulder bag Visetos Liz. Dimensions: Large shopper 36*28*17, Small shoulder bag 29*21. Style 65007
